name: @moolam/contract-mocks
description: Typed in-memory reference implementations of @moolam/contracts (memory, model, reasoning, …). The conformant floor for examples, Playground, and the conformance gate.

scripts.test: pnpm run build && node --test tests/memory_model_reasoning.test.mjs tests/knowledge_tool_planning.test.mjs tests/speech_vision_runtime.test.mjs
